def compress_string(s: str) -> str:
    if not s:
        return ""

    compressed_parts = []
    i = 0
    n = len(s)

    while i < n:
        current_char = s[i]
        count = 0
        j = i
        while j < n and s[j] == current_char:
            count += 1
            j += 1

        compressed_parts.append(current_char)
        if count > 1:
            compressed_parts.append(str(count))

        i = j

    compressed_string = "".join(compressed_parts)

    return compressed_string if len(compressed_string) < len(s) else s
